allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Socius\\Desktop\\Eclipse-Project" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object -Property FullName, PSIsContainer | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR:  $\($_.FullName\)" } else { "FILE: $\($_.FullName\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Socius\\Desktop\\Eclipse-Project" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -Property FullName | Sort-Object FullName | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$\($env:TEMP\)\\eclipse_tree.json"; Get-Content "$\($env:TEMP\)\\eclipse_tree.json" | Select-Object -First 200)

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Socius\\Desktop\\Eclipse-Project" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer }; $dirs = Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Socius\\Desktop\\Eclipse-Project" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer }; Write-Host "=== DIRECTORY STRUCTURE ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host "Total Directories: $\($dirs.Count\)"; Write-Host "Total Files: $\($files.Count\)"; Write-Host "`n=== MAIN DIRECTORIES ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Socius\\Desktop\\Eclipse-Project" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $count = @\(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer }\).Count; Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $count files" })
